response:
# Ad Template

Here are several **ad templates** for different formats and purposes:

---

## 📱 Social Media Ad Template

```
[HOOK - Attention-grabbing headline]
[PROBLEM - Pain point your audience faces]
[SOLUTION - How your product/service helps]
[PROOF - Testimonial, stat, or result]
[CTA - Call to action]
```

**Example:**
> **Tired of wasting money on ads that don't convert?**
> Most businesses lose thousands before figuring out what works.
> Our AI-powered platform optimizes your campaigns automatically.
> "We 3X'd our ROI in 30 days." – Jane D.
> 👉 **Start your free trial today →**

---

## 🖼️ Display/Banner Ad Template

| Element | Content |
|--------|---------|
| **Headline** | Bold, 5–10 words |
| **Subheadline** | Supporting detail |
| **Visual** | Product/lifestyle image |
| **CTA Button** | "Shop Now" / "Learn More" |
| **Logo** | Brand identity |

---

## 📧 Email Ad / Sponsored Content Template

```
Subject Line: [Benefit] + [Curiosity or Urgency]

Body:
- Opening hook (1–2 sentences)
- Problem statement
- Product/service introduction
- Key benefits (3 bullet points)
- Social proof
- CTA button
- Disclaimer/unsubscribe link
```

---

## 📺 Video Ad Script Template (15–30 sec)

```
0–3 sec:   HOOK     → Grab attention immediately
3–10 sec:  PROBLEM  → Relate to viewer's pain
10–20 sec: SOLUTION → Introduce your offer
20–25 sec: PROOF    → Quick stat or testimonial
25–30 sec: CTA      → Tell them what to do next
```

---

## 🔍 Google Search Ad Template

```
Headline 1: [Primary Keyword / Benefit]        (30 chars)
Headline 2: [Unique Selling Proposition]       (30 chars)
Headline 3: [CTA or Offer]                     (30 chars)

Description 1: [Problem + Solution]            (90 chars)
Description 2: [Proof + CTA]                   (90 chars)

Display URL: yoursite.com/keyword
```

---

## ✍️ Fill-in-the-Blank Universal Template

> **"Are you [TARGET AUDIENCE] struggling with [PROBLEM]?**
> Introducing [PRODUCT/SERVICE] — the [ADJECTIVE] way to [DESIRED OUTCOME].
> [PROOF/STAT].
> [CTA] — [OFFER/INCENTIVE]."**

---

## 💡 Tips for Effective Ads

- ✅ **One clear message** per ad
- ✅ **Strong CTA** (be specific)
- ✅ **Address the audience's pain point**
- ✅ **Use numbers/stats** for credibility
- ✅ **Create urgency** ("Limited time," "Only 10 left")
- ✅ **Match ad to landing page**

---

Would you like a template customized for a **specific platform, industry, or product**? 🎯
